message: The other night, we had a surprise blackout, and I have to say, for once, I felt like the hero of my own little story! I grabbed my trusty flashlight and powered up my phone with a power bank I’d tucked away for emergencies. My kids, who usually roll their eyes at my preparedness chats, were suddenly impressed when I lit up the living room with our battery-operated lanterns. We even turned it into a cozy little camping experience, complete with snacks from the fridge before everything got too warm! It felt great to be the prepared one for once, and it reminded me how little things can make such a difference in an unexpected situation. Have you ever had a moment where your preparedness paid off? This little refresher helped me feel ready!
